summary: Integrated ADR 0226 on top of repo release 0.177.51 by replaying `make configure-host-control-loops` from the latest origin/main merged candidate, confirming the host-resident systemd service, timer, and path units stayed idempotent, and re-verifying both manual and path-triggered reconcile runs end to end on proxmox_florin.

verification.check: Merged-main workflow contract and regression slice
verification.observed: `make workflow-info WORKFLOW=configure-host-control-loops` reported the expected ADR 0226 host-live workflow contract, and `uv run --with pytest pytest -q tests/test_proxmox_host_control_loops_role.py` returned `3 passed in 0.05s` on the latest origin/main merged candidate.

`make configure-host-control-loops` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0226-main-merge` with final recap `proxmox_florin ok=33 changed=0 failed=0`, proving the repo-managed host control-loop baseline remained idempotent after rebasing onto the latest origin/main baseline.

verification.check: Live systemd state after merged-main replay
verification.observed: `systemctl show` on `proxmox_florin` reported `lv3-host-control-loop-reconcile.service Result=success ActiveState=inactive SubState=dead UnitFileState=static`, the timer as `active/waiting` with `NextElapseUSecRealtime=Sat 2026-03-28 22:30:59 CET` and `LastTriggerUSec=Sat 2026-03-28 22:01:21 CET`, and the path unit as `active/waiting` with `Triggers=lv3-host-control-loop-reconcile.service`.

verification.check: Explicit one-shot reconcile replay from the integrated candidate
verification.observed: `sudo systemctl start lv3-host-control-loop-reconcile.service` recorded `trigger: scheduled_or_manual` at `2026-03-28T21:24:49Z` with `history_path: /var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/runs/20260328T212449Z.json`.

verification.check: Path-triggered reconcile replay from the integrated candidate
verification.observed: Writing request `{"reason":"ws-0226-main-merge-20260328T2125Z"}` to `/var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/requests/reconcile.request` was consumed immediately; `latest.json` recorded `trigger: path_request` at `2026-03-28T21:25:04Z` with `history_path: /var/lib/lv3-host-control-loops/runs/20260328T212504Z.json`, and the journal showed a clean start and finish at `22:25:04 CET`.

notes: The earlier branch-local live-apply receipt remains preserved as the first isolated-worktree replay, but this latest-main merged receipt is the canonical source for the release and platform bump that follow from the current integration branch.

The earlier oneshot contract repair remains effective on the merged-main candidate: the replay stayed idempotent with `changed=0`, the manual start returned `trigger: scheduled_or_manual`, and the path-triggered request executed cleanly without returning to `start-limit-hit`.

The integrated release step that follows this receipt updates `VERSION`, `RELEASE.md`, `changelog.md`, `docs/release-notes/*`, `README.md`, `build/platform-manifest.json`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and the workstream metadata to record ADR 0226 in repo version 0.177.52 and platform version 0.130.42.
